notes.body: The Power of One — Ops Manual is our single source of truth. Every GM develops 2 future GMs/yr, min 6 shift leaders. Win shops on Halo Effect, Suggestive Selling, and grill culture. Standing: June budget workbook (2065 sheet bottom), Large soda 30¢ upsell, FGU 0% overdue.

K.P.I. Ranking — 60% of score = Secret Shops + Customer Complaints + Ticket times. Spot-check registers unannounced (fry/drink/shake every time), coach in huddles, greet every guest, grill culture (2 for guys / 1 for girls), stay rush-ready. Standing (6/18): file a hub ticket for any outside vendor call.

Open 2065 tasks: Labor Review 7/1-7/4, Post Period Labor Not Posted 7/5, Inv-Final for Post 7/5, vendor receives (BOSS Alpha 7/1+7/3, Performance Foodservice 7/3), transfer receive KY-1788 Middleton 7/3. Clear in NetChef.
Hub ticket #9709 — first faucet on the potato sink stripped out again (the one Naomi repaired last visit). Photo attached. Tracked on the hub until repaired.
New hire Megan Kurschner processed and good to schedule. In directory as PHONE PENDING — still need her phone to complete the row. Pull from background-check PDF or ask HR (jmoffatt@estep-co.com).
